name: head CT trauma — critical finding lacks communication language

report.findings: Intracranial: 9 mm right frontal acute subdural haematoma. Mass effect with 5 mm leftward midline shift. No herniation. Extra-axial: as above. Skull: non-displaced right frontal fracture. Soft tissues: overlying scalp swelling.
report.impression:
1. Critical right frontal acute subdural haematoma with 5 mm midline shift.
2. Non-displaced right frontal skull fracture.
